svg.title: Resolved graph conjectures timeline
svg.desc: Marketing illustration of solved and disproved graph conjecture timelines from OPG and arXiv literature reviews.
svg.text: From first claim to proof or counterexample, across OPG and arXiv.

line.title: Real roots of the flow polynomial: 1981 to 2013
Edge-disjoint Hamilton cycles in highly strongly connected tournaments.: 1982 to 2014
Coloring the Odd Distance Graph: 1986 to 2024
Partitionning a tournament into k-strongly connected subtournaments.: 1989 to 2016
Highly arc transitive two ended digraphs: 1993 to 2014
Universal highly arc transitive digraphs: 1993 to 2014
What is the largest graph of positive curvature?: 2001 to 2023
Laplacian Degrees of a Graph: 2007 to 2008
Antichains in the cycle continuous order: 2007 to 2017
Number of Cliques in Minor-Closed Classes: 2007 to 2017
Every prism over a 3-connected planar graph is hamiltonian.: 2007 to 2019
PTAS for feedback arc set in tournaments: 2007 to 2022
Cores of strongly regular graphs: 2008 to 2019
Bounding the on-line choice number in terms of the choice number: 2009 to 2016
Vertex Coloring of graph fractional powers: 2010 to 2012
Extremal problem on the number of tree endomorphism: 2011 to 2013
Are vertex minor closed classes chi-bounded?: 2012 to 2022
Chromatic Number of Common Graphs: 2012 to 2025
Erdős-Posa property for long directed cycles: 2013 to 2015
Circular flow number of regular class 1 graphs: 2015 to 2022
Informal Conjecture on Correspondence Chromatic Number of Planar Graphs Without Cycles 4–8: 2016 to 2024
Open problem on lower bound for concentration interval: 2017 to 2019
Queue Number of Planar Graphs: 2017 to 2020
Informal Conjecture on Tight Constant for Clique Chromatic Number: 2017 to 2023
Question (Riemannian surfaces): cop number bounded by genus: 2017 to 2024
Informal conjecture on extending Mandache's Theorem 1.1 to all abelian groups: 2019 to 2019
Θ(√m) excess conjecture for hypergraph cuts: 2019 to 2024
Open Problem: Finding a Shortest Even Hole: 2020 to 2020
Informal conjecture on single-conflict chromatic number of degenerate graphs: 2020 to 2021
Open Question: (theta, triangle)-free graphs of bounded degree: 2020 to 2021
Open problem: χ-bounded vs. polynomially χ-bounded: 2020 to 2022
Conjecture on unavoidable G-dependence in Theorem 2: 2020 to 2024
FPT on $K_{t,t}$-free graphs for Grundy Coloring: 2020 to 2024
Parameterized complexity of Partial Grundy Coloring on general graphs: 2020 to 2025
Open Problem (asymptotic behavior of f(H,q)): 2021 to 2021
Informal remark on completeness of known forests satisfying Esperet's conjecture: 2021 to 2022
Conjecture on Sufficiency of Conditions E, R, T for Generic Tuples: 2022 to 2022
Open Problem: 5-Coloring complexity for H-free graphs with a P4 component: 2022 to 2023
Open Question: NP-hardness of List-k-Coloring on rP3-free graphs: 2022 to 2023
Informal Conjecture (polynomial saving in the bipartite case): 2022 to 2024
Conjecture on r-free digraphs with r > 2n/3: 2022 to 2026
Polynomial degree-bounding function for hereditary degree-bounded classes: 2023 to 2025
Complexity of Rotation Distance Between Binary Search Trees: 2023 to 2026
Conjecture 5.3 (Large dom implies an ω̄-cluster): 2023 to 2026
Informal conjecture on sharp threshold for linear-proportion reconstruction: 2023 to 2026
Informal conjecture: coarse Menger for bounded genus: 2025 to 2026
